Card Variants

Default

Balanced surface for app UI and internal tools.

Elevated

A stronger shadow helps distinguish featured content.

Outline

Subtle presentation for secondary content blocks.

Glass

Fast SSR

Pure Nim

No external JS framework required.

Progressive
